raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ar to nahze ta jauna
Meita pee ta Kehnixa/un ko win-
na praſtija/tappe winnai dohts/
ka winna ar tahs nahktu no ta
Gaspaschu-Namma us ta Keh-
nixa Kamimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wakkaraâ eegahje winna/
um Rihta nahze winna atkat us
to obtru Gaspascho-Nainu/semn
Saisgafa ta Kehnixa Kambar-
Junkura/to leeſo Seewu Sar-
ga Riobku/ winna ne nahze at-
kat pee ta Kehnixa / ka ween/
kad tas Kehnisch winan gribbe-
ja/ un winna pee Wahrda fauk-
ta tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas nospreests
Laiks Esteres/ Abiaita Meitas/
Mardakajus Brahneeka / ( kas
winnu par Meitu bij peenzehmis/) 
atgahje/ ka tai bij pee ta Kehni-
na nahkt/ tad ne praſtija winna
ne ko/ bes ween/ ko Egajus tas
Kehnixa Kambar-Junkurs to
Gaspaschu-Sargs fazzija. Un
Estere atradde Schehlastibu
preeſch wiſſeem / kas winnu
redſeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta tappe Estere pee ta
Kehnixa Aiswerns neinta/eekſch
ta Kehnixa Namma / deſmita
Mehnefi/ kas Tebets tohp no-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch miſſi
to Esteri pahr wiſſahm Gas-
schabni/ un winna dabbuja w-
rak Schehlastibas un Apsche-
chanas winna Preekſcha/ ne
wiſſas Jumprawas/ un win-
likke to Kehnixa Krohni us wi-
nas Galwn / un darrija to p-
Kehnizinni Wasti Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad darrija tas Kehnix-
leclas Dſihres wiſſeem tawe-
Leelem-Kungeim un ſawe-
Kalpeim/ tahs bija Esteres Di-
res/ nn likke tahs Walstibas du-
teht/ un iſdewe Dahwanas pe-
ta Kehnixa Baggatibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu obtra Reife ta-
Jumprawas tappe ſapulzeta-
tad fehdeja Mardakajus ta Ke-
nixa Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Estere ne bij ſa-
Radnu/neds fawus Landis ſta-
ſijti/ jo Estere darrija pehz Ma-
dakajus Wahrda/ ka to Laik-
kad winna pee ta tappe uſa-
dſinata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tannis Deenas / k-
Mardakajus eekſch ta Kehni-
Wahrtim fehdeja / apſaita-
Bigtans un Teeres/ diwi Ka-
bar-Junkuri ta Kehnixa no tee-
Sleekſna-Sargeim/ un mekle-
Rohkas pee ta Kehnixa Aaſu-
rus peelikt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fchi Leeta tappe Ma-
dakajun ſinnama darrita /
winsch ſtahtija to tai Kehnizi-
net Esterei/ un Estere fazzija
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
